summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Somvanshi CRM MVP with backend API testing (97.3% success) and frontend UI/integration testing. Login functionality, dashboard, leads management, pipeline visualization, and role-based access control all working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Intermittent 502 error on lead update operation
minor_issues.impact: Temporary server issue, not a code bug
minor_issues.details: Occurred once during testing, appears to be environment-related

status_code_inconsistencies.impact: No functional impact, data created successfully
status_code_inconsistencies.details: API returns correct data, status code convention issue only

ui_bugs.issue: Lead creation shows validation error despite successful submission
ui_bugs.impact: Shows 'Failed to create lead' message but lead is actually created
ui_bugs.details: Form validation UI not properly handling 200 status response

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay sometimes blocks navigation clicks
ui_bugs.impact: Users may need to press Escape or click outside modal to clear overlay
ui_bugs.details: Occurred when testing pipeline navigation after lead form submission

chart_rendering_warnings.issue: Chart library warnings about width/height dimensions
chart_rendering_warnings.impact: Charts display correctly but console warnings present
chart_rendering_warnings.details: Recharts library reporting width(-1) and height(-1) warnings

passed_tests: Admin and sales user login with correct credentials
Dashboard stats display (Total Leads, Pipeline Value, Closed Revenue, Conversion Rate)
Leads page loading with data table and search functionality
Pipeline page with 11 stage columns and drag-drop interface
Activities and Meetings pages with add/schedule functionality
Reports page with period tabs and export functionality
Role-based access control - sales users cannot access Team Performance
Navigation between all major pages working
Backend API endpoints (36/37 tests passed - 97.3% success rate)
User authentication and authorization working correctly
CRUD operations for leads, activities, and meetings
Dashboard statistics calculation and team performance metrics
Report generation with filtering and data export

medium_priority: Fix lead form validation UI to properly handle 200 status responses instead of showing error
Resolve modal overlay click-blocking issue in dialog components
low_priority: Update create endpoints to return 201 status code for consistency
Fix chart rendering dimension warnings in dashboard
Investigate intermittent 502 error on lead updates
